Step 5: Images

Step 5 of 5

Do you want to set up image spots now, or add images later?

Use filenames (hero.jpg) or full URLs (https://...)

How images work:
• If you type hero.jpg, put a file named hero.jpg in the same folder as index.html when you host your site.
• If you type images/hero.jpg, create an images folder next to index.html and put hero.jpg inside it.
• You can also paste full image URLs (like https://example.com/pic.jpg) and the site will load them from the internet.
